Name: NPC_INFO_PARAM
Description: Stores NPC-specific information such as death state tracking, grave generation settings, name text references, and miscellaneous gameplay values.

Fields.Name: Grave Generation Time
Fields.Description: Specifies the time required before the NPC's grave appears after death.

Fields.Name: Death Time Storage ID
Fields.Description: Event value ID used to store the NPC's recorded death time.

Fields.Name: Death Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag indicating whether the NPC has died.

Fields.Name: Grave Soul Cost
Fields.Description: Soul cost required to interact with or restore the NPC via their grave.

Fields.Name: Character Text ID
Fields.Description: References the text entry used for the NPC's displayed name.

Fields.Name: General Purpose Value: 0
Fields.Description: Generic configurable value reserved for game logic or scripting.

Fields.Name: General Purpose Value: 1
Fields.Description: Generic configurable value reserved for game logic or scripting.

Fields.Name: General Purpose Value: 2
Fields.Description: Generic configurable value reserved for game logic or scripting.

Fields.Name: General Purpose Value: 3
Fields.Description: Generic configurable value reserved for game logic or scripting.

Fields.Name: General Purpose Value: 4
Fields.Description: Generic configurable value reserved for game logic or scripting.

Fields.Name: General Purpose Value: 5
Fields.Description: Generic configurable value reserved for game logic or scripting.
